lines.speaker: Yolotli, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Nilsal, my child. Welcome to our humble camp. Do stop and rest if you need to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Yolotli, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: My companion and I are the teoki responsible for the Proudspire obelisk, one of our most precious holy sites. However, the peak of the mountain is not overly welcoming, so we keep our camp down here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's so important about this obelisk?

lines.speaker: Yolotli, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: It was built by those who wandered these lands before we did. They worshipped Ralos and Ranul just as we now do. The obelisk was a site of great religious importance to them, and so it is to us as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But what is it actually for?

lines.speaker: Yolotli, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: That is something we sadly don't know. It is why the obelisk is especially important to those who serve Ranul. It is a reminder of the importance in ensuring knowledge is preserved.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better be on my way.

lines.speaker: Yolotli, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Take care, my child. May the sun light your way.
